atk1-text: Roll Venom + TR vs. STR + SR against an adjacent Insect. The target gains Wounds and Poisoned for each Net Success.
atk2-text: Roll Heat + TR vs. SPE + TR against an adjacent Insect. The target gains Wounds and Burns for each Net Success.
atk3-text: Roll Flight + TR. Each Insect in a line within Flight Hexes Rolls STR + TR to Resist, then gains Wounds and is Pushed 1 for each Net Success.
atk4-text: Roll SPE + TR vs. SPE + TR against an adjacent Insect. The target gains Wounds for each Net Success.
